Header.name: Bandar Fayez Saeed Hassanin
Header.title: Hajj, Umrah & Tourism Hospitality Services Management

Profile.summary: Early retiree from the Saudi Electricity Company with decades of extensive experience managing field services for pilgrims. Holds an Industrial High School Diploma, a degree from the Saudi Electricity Company Institute, and a one-year Diploma in Hajj and Umrah Services Management (Graduated 1419-1420 AH with a 'Very Good' grade).

jobs.title: Head of Field Service Office
jobs.description: For pilgrims from Algeria, Oman, Egypt, Chad, and Sudan.

jobs.title: Deputy Head of Field Service Office
Member of Tourism Offices for Egyptian Pilgrims
Deputy Head of Field Service Group
jobs.description: For pilgrims from Mauritania and Somalia.

jobs.title: Field Service Group Member
jobs.description: For pilgrims from Somalia, Djibouti, Eritrea, Comoros, and Morocco.

jobs.title: Saudi Electricity Company
jobs.description: Employed at the Makkah Al-Mukarramah branch.
